allow: Bash(mv 方案文档.md ../方案文档.md.bak)
Bash(ls -la && ls -la ../my-site 2>/dev/null || echo "my-site not found in parent")

Bash(node -e "const path=require\('path'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=path.join\(process.cwd\(\),'content'\); console.log\(d, fs.existsSync\(d\)\); console.log\(fs.readdirSync\(d\)\); const e=path.join\(d,'essay'\); console.log\(e, fs.existsSync\(e\)\); if\(fs.existsSync\(e\)\) console.log\(fs.readdirSync\(e\)\);")
